summary: Iteration 7 'Twilio SMS Bridge Integration' testing complete - All 9 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend features verified. Twilio SMS bridge is now active with real credentials. SMS endpoint returns actual Twilio error messages (not generic 502). Email bridge shows 'COMING SOON' badge.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/bridges/status correctly returns {sms_configured: true, email_configured: false}
POST /api/bridges/sms now returns Twilio's actual error message (e.g., 'Invalid To Phone Number') instead of generic 502
POST /api/bridges/email correctly returns 503 with 'Email bridge not configured' message
ContactsView correctly fetches bridge status on mount and displays indicators
SMS compose card opens with input field and Send button when clicking phone icon on off-app contacts
Email Bridge shows 'COMING SOON' badge with orange styling
All sidebar navigation items work correctly
seed_data_creation: 3 TEST_Contact entries with phone numbers exist for SMS testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 complete. Twilio SMS Bridge is now LIVE with real credentials. Key features verified: (1) Backend - GET /api/bridges/status returns {sms_configured: true, email_configured: false}, POST /api/bridges/sms with invalid phone returns 400 with Twilio error message (not generic 502), POST /api/bridges/email returns 503 'Email bridge not configured'. (2) Frontend - Contacts page shows 'SMS Bridge: Active — Twilio connected' indicator, 'Email Bridge: COMING SOON' badge with orange styling, off-app contacts with phone numbers have phone icon button for SMS, clicking SMS button opens compose card with input and Send button. (3) Regression - Login works, Call History page loads, Tables/Events/VAPID key endpoints work, all sidebar navigation items work.

backend_twilio_sms.sms_error_handling: POST /api/bridges/sms with invalid phone returns 400 with Twilio error message (e.g., 'Invalid To Phone Number')
backend_twilio_sms.email_not_configured: POST /api/bridges/email returns 503 with 'Email bridge not configured' message

frontend_contacts.sms_bridge_indicator: Shows 'SMS Bridge: Active — Twilio connected' with green styling
frontend_contacts.email_coming_soon: Shows 'Email Bridge: COMING SOON' badge with orange styling (data-testid='email-coming-soon')
frontend_contacts.sms_button: Off-app contacts with phone numbers have phone icon button (data-testid='contact-sms-{id}')
frontend_contacts.sms_compose: Clicking SMS button opens compose card (data-testid='sms-compose') with input and Send button

regression.call_history: GET /api/calls/history returns call logs, Call History page loads
regression.sidebar_nav: All sidebar items work: My Portal, Calendar, Messages, Walkie Talkie, Call History, Apps, Contacts

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/bridges/email returns 503 - Resend API key not configured
mocked_apis.note: SMS bridge is REAL Twilio (trial account - can only send to verified numbers). Email bridge returns 503 as Resend not configured.

twilio_trial_note: Twilio trial account can only send SMS to verified numbers. Test with invalid numbers returns 400 with Twilio error message.
